hero.title: About Toko Trading
hero.subtitle: As one of Turkey's leading international trade companies, we have been providing trusted solutions worldwide for over 20 years.

overview.heading: Our Story
overview.p1: Toko Trading was established in 2003 in Istanbul as a company specializing in international trade. Since our founding, we have been working with the vision of being a reliable trade bridge between Turkey and the world.
overview.p2: Throughout our 20+ years of experience, we have carried out thousands of successful trade operations in food, textile, machinery, chemicals, and many other sectors. Thanks to our strong business partnerships in over 50 countries, we offer our clients the most suitable solutions.
overview.p3: Our team consists of experienced professionals who provide professional support at every stage of international trade. We serve a wide range of areas from customs procedures to logistics management, from market research to quality control.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a leading trade platform connecting our clients to global markets by leveraging Turkey's strategic position in international trade. We aim to shape the future of the industry by integrating technology and innovation into our business processes.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To help our clients grow their businesses by managing their international trade processes transparently, reliably, and efficiently. To build long-term business partnerships by applying the highest quality standards in every project.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: Core principles that shape our business approach

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We stand behind every commitment and deliver on our promises on time and in full. Our clients' trust in us is our greatest asset.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We maintain open and transparent communication throughout all our business processes. Our clients are informed and involved at every stage.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We closely follow industry developments, continuously improve our processes, and offer our clients the most modern solutions available.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work with our clients not just as a service provider but as a long-term strategic partner, viewing their success as our own.

cta.title: Ready to Partner With Us?
cta.description: Contact us today for your international trade needs. Let us create solutions tailored to your business.

import.metaDescription: Comprehensive solutions for raw material and product import from around the world. Professional import services including customs procedures, logistics management, and cost optimization.
import.title: Import Services
import.subtitle: End-to-end professional import solutions for raw material and product sourcing worldwide

overview.p1: At Toko Trading, we provide comprehensive solutions for importing all types of raw materials and products from around the world. We offer professional support at every stage of the import process, from customs procedures to logistics planning, supplier selection to quality control.
overview.p2: Leveraging Turkey's strategic location, we source products from Europe, Asia, and Africa under the most favorable conditions. With over 20 years of experience, we closely monitor changes in customs regulations and provide cost advantages to our clients.
overview.p3: We assign a dedicated team for each import project, ensuring transparent communication from start to finish. We meticulously manage critical stages such as finding suitable suppliers, price negotiations, quality control, and shipment tracking.

customs.title: Customs Procedures Management
customs.description: Our expert team ensures fast and seamless customs clearance for all declaration procedures, tariff classification, and import duty calculations.

logistics.title: International Logistics
logistics.description: Optimal cost and time-efficient shipping planning via sea, air, and land. Comprehensive logistics services including container management and warehousing solutions.

costOptimization.title: Cost Optimization
costOptimization.description: We analyze all your import expenses from procurement costs to freight charges, customs duties to insurance costs, creating savings opportunities at every step.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control & Inspection
qualityControl.description: Pre-shipment factory inspections, product sample testing, and production process monitoring ensure delivery of products meeting your quality standards.

documentation.title: Import Documentation
documentation.description: Complete preparation and tracking of invoices, bills of lading, certificates of origin, and all other import documents. Regulation-compliant documentation management.

step1.title: Needs Analysis
step1.description: We perform detailed analysis of your import needs, determining product specifications and quantity requirements.

step2.title: Supplier Selection
step2.description: We find the most suitable suppliers from our global network, compare prices, and finalize suppliers with your approval.

step3.title: Order & Shipment
step3.description: We manage the ordering process, track production, and plan shipment via the most optimal logistics route.

step4.title: Customs & Delivery
step4.description: We swiftly complete customs procedures and safely deliver your products to your desired location.

cta.title: Get Support for Your Import Project
cta.description: Talk to our expert team about your import needs. We manage the entire process from the country of origin to your doorstep.

export.metaDescription: Product export from Turkey to global markets. Market research, buyer matching, and export documentation support to grow your exports.
export.title: Export Services
export.subtitle: Professional export support to help you reach global markets from Turkey

overview.p1: We offer comprehensive export services to help you bring Turkey's rich manufacturing capabilities to global markets. We professionally manage all processes including target market identification, buyer sourcing, pricing strategy, and export documentation.
overview.p2: Thanks to our business partnerships and buyer network in over 50 countries, we identify the best markets and buyers for your products. We accelerate your exports with our strong position especially in European, Middle Eastern, and CIS markets.
overview.p3: We are by your side at every stage of the export process. We carefully manage all details from letter of credit procedures to customs declarations, freight organization to insurance procedures.

marketResearch.title: Market Research & Analysis
marketResearch.description: We shape your export strategy by analyzing demand structures, competitive conditions, and price dynamics of target markets.

buyerMatching.title: Buyer Sourcing & Matching
buyerMatching.description: We find qualified buyers for your products through our extensive buyer network and international trade fair participation.

documentation.title: Export Documentation
documentation.description: Complete preparation and management of letters of credit, bills of lading, certificates of origin, ATR documents, and other export documents.

compliance.title: Regulatory Consulting
compliance.description: We ensure compliance with target countries' import regulations, standard requirements, and certification processes with expert support.

logistics.title: Export Logistics
logistics.description: On-time and safe delivery through container planning, freight negotiation, and shipment tracking. Sea, air, and land options available.

step1.title: Market Assessment
step1.description: We research potential markets for your products and identify target markets that will provide the highest returns.

step2.title: Buyer Matching
step2.description: We find qualified buyers in target markets, managing initial contact and negotiation processes.

step3.title: Documentation & Order
step3.description: We prepare all export documents, manage the order confirmation process, and coordinate production planning.

step4.title: Shipment & Tracking
step4.description: We organize logistics, complete customs procedures, and track delivery of your products to the buyer.

cta.title: Let's Grow Your Exports
cta.description: Talk to our expert team about expanding from Turkey to global markets. We develop strategies specific to your target market.

sourcing.metaDescription: Product sourcing at the best price and quality through our global supply network. Supplier auditing, quality control, and price negotiation services.
sourcing.title: Sourcing Solutions
sourcing.subtitle: We source the best-fit products for your business through our global supply network

overview.p1: We source the products your business needs at the best price and quality through our global supply network. We help you build reliable supply chains through supplier research, factory visits, and quality audits.
overview.p2: With our extensive supplier network in Turkey, China, India, Southeast Asia, and other manufacturing centers, we meet your product needs across different sectors. We evaluate each supplier through independent audits and reference checks.
overview.p3: We provide professional support at every stage of the sourcing process, from sample management to bulk order coordination, production tracking to quality control. We offer transparent reporting and regular updates to our clients.

supplierAudit.title: Supplier Auditing
supplierAudit.description: We identify reliable business partners by conducting on-site audits of potential suppliers' production capacity, quality standards, and financial structure.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.description: We guarantee your quality through pre-production sample approval, production process monitoring, and pre-shipment final inspection.

priceNegotiation.title: Price Negotiation
priceNegotiation.description: We secure the most competitive prices with our market knowledge and volume advantage. Transparent pricing through cost breakdown analysis.

sampleManagement.title: Sample Management
sampleManagement.description: We manage product sample procurement, evaluation, and approval processes. We offer prototype development support for custom production requests.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain Management
supplyChain.description: We minimize risks through supply continuity, stock planning, and alternative supplier management.

step1.title: Requirements Gathering
step1.description: We determine your product specifications, quantities, and quality requirements in detail.

step2.title: Supplier Search
step2.description: We find suitable suppliers from our network, conduct factory audits, and forward your sample requests.

step3.title: Negotiation & Order
step3.description: We negotiate the most favorable terms, define contract conditions, and initiate the ordering process.

step4.title: Tracking & Delivery
step4.description: We monitor production, perform quality checks, and ensure timely delivery of your products.

cta.title: Looking for Reliable Suppliers?
cta.description: Let us source the products you need under the most favorable conditions through our global supply network. Our expert team creates solutions tailored for you.

transit-trade.metaDescription: Transit trade operations from Turkey to third countries. Specialized transit trade solutions for Russia and CIS countries.
transit-trade.title: Transit Trade
transit-trade.subtitle: Efficient transit trade operations leveraging Turkey's strategic location

overview.p1: We conduct effective transit trade operations leveraging Turkey's strategic position at the crossroads of Europe, Asia, and the Middle East. We offer specialized solutions particularly for trade flows between Russia and CIS countries and Europe.
overview.p2: In transit trade operations, we manage critical elements such as customs regulations, sanctions compliance, logistics planning, and warehousing with our experienced team. By simplifying multi-customs crossings and complex trade routes, we provide cost and time advantages to our clients.
overview.p3: We conduct detailed feasibility studies for each transit trade project, determining the most suitable routes and logistics solutions. We optimize your trade flows by evaluating free zone and bonded warehouse facilities.

transitRoutes.title: Strategic Route Planning
transitRoutes.description: We create route plans that optimize trade flows. We determine the most efficient routes by balancing cost, time, and risk factors.

cisExpertise.title: Russia & CIS Expertise
cisExpertise.description: We have deep knowledge of trade regulations and customs procedures in Russia, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, and other CIS countries, turning this expertise into your advantage.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.description: We ensure full compliance with international sanctions, trade restrictions, and customs regulations. We minimize legal risks.

customs.title: Multi-Customs Management
customs.description: We coordinate all declarations and procedures for goods passing through multiple countries' customs in a coordinated manner.

warehousing.title: Warehousing & Distribution
warehousing.description: We offer warehousing, consolidation, and distribution services at free zone and bonded warehouse facilities in Turkey.

step1.title: Feasibility Analysis
step1.description: We analyze the viability of your transit trade project, perform cost-benefit calculations, and determine the most suitable strategy.

step2.title: Route & Logistics Planning
step2.description: We determine the optimal transit route, coordinate with our logistics partners, and plan warehousing needs.

step3.title: Customs & Compliance
step3.description: We manage customs procedures of relevant countries, obtain necessary permits and documents.

step4.title: Operations & Delivery
step4.description: We manage the transit trade operation from start to finish, ensuring goods safely reach the destination country.

cta.title: Let's Explore Transit Trade Opportunities
cta.description: Talk to our expert team about evaluating your transit trade potential through Turkey.

hero.title: Transit Trade to Russia & CIS via Turkey
hero.subtitle: Leveraging Turkey's strategic position, we provide safe, fast, and compliant transit trade solutions to Russia and CIS countries.

whatIs.title: Turkey: The Trade Bridge Between Europe and Russia
whatIs.p1: Transit trade involves shipping goods from one country to another through a third country. Turkey, with its geographic location, advanced port infrastructure, and customs expertise, serves as an ideal transit hub between Europe, the Middle East, and Russia.
whatIs.p2: At Toko Trading, we have over 20 years of experience in transit trade operations to Russia and CIS countries via Turkey. We professionally manage all processes from customs procedures to logistics management, regulatory compliance to documentation.
whatIs.p3: In recent years, changing trade dynamics have made Turkey's role in transit trade even more important. Our company provides clients with the most up-to-date and compliant solutions adapted to these changes.

q1.question: What is transit trade?
q1.answer: Transit trade is a form of international trade where goods are shipped from the producing country to the consuming country through a third country (in this case, Turkey). Goods pass through Turkey's customs zone or are re-exported to the destination country.

q2.question: What products can be transited through Turkey?
q2.answer: Food products, textiles, machinery, chemicals, construction materials, electronics, and many other product categories can be transited through Turkey. However, different customs and regulatory requirements may apply to each product group.

q3.question: How long does transit trade typically take?
q3.answer: The process varies depending on the product type, route, and customs procedures. A typical transit transaction is completed within 2-6 weeks. Sea shipments take longer while land routes offer faster delivery options.

q4.question: What documentation is required?
q4.answer: Commercial invoices, certificates of origin, bills of lading, packing lists, and any special product certifications are required. Customs declarations and transit documents are prepared by Toko Trading.

q5.question: How does compliance work?
q5.answer: Toko Trading operates in full compliance with international sanctions and trade regulations. We work with expert legal consultants to follow the latest legislation and manage all transactions transparently and with proper documentation.
